name: Lemon Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
Soften gelatin in cold water and set aside. Beat egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored. Combine yolks, 1 cup sugar, lemon rind, juice, and salt in a saucepan; stir until smooth. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes or until thickened. Remove from heat and add gelatin, stirring until the gelatin granules dissolve. Cool. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until soft peaks form. Fold egg whites and whipped cream into lemon mixture; pour into crust. Chill until set. Garnish with lemon slices if desired. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
NOTE: The recipe makes enough filling for two pies when using commercial graham cracker crusts.
